function.name: transfer_to_agent
function.description: Warm transfer the caller to a live agent via Genesys Cloud. Use for: payment disputes, coverage/eligibility questions, caller requests for a human, or unresolvable issues. Always provide a reason and conversation summary.

reason.description: Why the caller is being transferred

summary.description: Summary of conversation so far to pass to the receiving agent

queue.description: Target queue: Billing Specialists, Licensed Agents, or General Support
